name: Tove 12x20 Gambrel Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage & Workshop Design
open_features: Classic barn-style gambrel roof maximizes interior headroom and usable wall space-ideal for tall shelving, overhead storage, or an optional loft.
Clean framing layout and easy-to-follow plans make this shed achievable for confident DIY builders and professionals alike.
Rustic barn-style double doors provide easy entry for lawn equipment, ATVs, workbenches, bikes, and large tools.
Warm vertical and horizontal wood siding, contrasting trim, and a traditional roof profile create a refined yet rustic look.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Tove Gambrel Shed Plan - a 12x20 barn-style storage and workspace solution designed for generous interior space, timeless appeal, and everyday functionality. Featuring a classic gambrel roof, wide barn-style double doors, and warm wood siding with a durable lower wall accent, Tove blends traditional barn character with modern practicality. Whether you're building a spacious workshop, garden and equipment shed, creative studio, or organized storage...
